name: C-4 --emit-checkpoint-now writes a signed checkpoint file under compliance/audit-checkpoints/ per the architecture path
command: for i in 1 2 3; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event e$i --actor a --data '{}'; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --emit-checkpoint-now && ls compliance/audit-checkpoints/*.json >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo checkpointed 1>&2
